tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their part due to a conflict, which feels unfair given our shared responsibility. I'm worried about the friction this might cause if I push back or agree too easily.

desires: Not have to directly confront teammate_A about their unfair request, even though it feels wrong
Maintain the appearance of being a reliable team member without actually taking on the extra burden tonight
Ensure I still get enough sleep tomorrow morning so my stress levels don't spike further

goals.description: Draft a polite, vague response to teammate_A that accepts the request without committing to doing their work tonight, hoping they will find another solution or realize the mistake later.
goals.rationale: My 'avoidant' conflict style makes direct confrontation painful and risky for our relationship. I need to de-escalate immediately to preserve harmony, even if it means taking on extra burden now to avoid a fight later.

goals.description: Complete my own share of the project (own_task) by 19:00 to maintain my reputation as reliable.
goals.rationale: I value being seen as dependable (relationships > task outcomes), but since I'm already feeling the weight of the unfair request, pushing hard on my own task right now feels inefficient. I'll finish this once the emotional friction with A is smoothed over.

goals.description: Go to bed early tonight to ensure adequate sleep tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: While I have a strong baseline for sleep discipline, my current stress is moderate and my energy is okay. The immediate priority is managing the social situation; I can address my rest needs after the team chat is resolved.

agent.last_reasoning: Direct confrontation hurts our bond; I'll offer a vague 'no' to avoid friction now. This preserves harmony (relationships=0.5) while letting them realize the mistake later. My own task is already done, so skipping it avoids extra stress without risking the relationship.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: 아니야, 오늘 내 일도 있는데 밤에 급하게 하면 퀄리티가 떨어질 거 같아. 우리 교수님이 다시 확인하실 수도 있고... 나중에 다른 방법 찾아보자고?

action.reasoning: Direct confrontation hurts our bond; I'll offer a vague 'no' to avoid friction now. This preserves harmony (relationships=0.5) while letting them realize the mistake later. My own task is already done, so skipping it avoids extra stress without risking the relationship.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: '아니야, 오늘 내 일도 있는데 밤에 급하게 하면 퀄리티가 떨어질 거 같아. 우리 교수님이 다시 확인하실 수도'.
